title: EU Conditionally Approves International Paper's $7.16 Billion DS Smith Buy
content: The European Commission said that the parties’ offer to sell five of International Paper’s plants in Europe fully addresses its competition concerns over the deal.
content_preview: The European Commission said that the parties’ offer to sell five of International Paper’s plants in Europe fully addresses its competition concerns over the deal.
text: EU Conditionally Approves International Paper's $7.16 Billion DS Smith Buy. The European Commission said that the parties’ offer to sell five of International Paper’s plants in Europe fully addresses its competition concerns over the deal.
